discipline.wait_sleep: Polling waits (waitForPageReady, waitForVisualSettle, pollFor2FA) preferred over static sleeps. Static sleeps are fallback only.

macros.name: apple-signin
macros.description: Apple ID sign-in via Chrome autofill on developer / appstoreconnect / icloud / developer_resources.

macros.name: vercel-login
macros.description: vercel.com/login via GitHub OAuth, relying on Tate's authenticated GitHub session in Chrome.

macros.name: coexist-admin-signin
macros.description: Co-Exist admin app sign-in via Chrome autofill on saved admin credential.

macros.name: xcode-organizer-upload
macros.description: Upload an iOS .xcarchive to App Store Connect via Xcode Organizer GUI on SY094 (MacInCloud Mac). Uses Tate Apple ID logged in to Xcode (no ASC API key required). Polling-wait discipline; 700s outer timeout.

archive_path.note: Full path on SY094 to the .xcarchive bundle

preconditions: macincloud-login macro has been run; Xcode > Settings > Accounts holds Tate's Apple ID
ssh2 npm package available on agent host (Corazon: installed 29 Apr 2026 by fork_mojpge0a_3c7dcd)

macros.name: transporter-upload
macros.description: Upload an iOS .ipa to App Store Connect via Apple Transporter.app GUI on SY094 (MacInCloud Mac). Uses Tate Apple ID logged in to Transporter (no API key required). Polling-wait discipline; 1000s outer timeout.

ipa_path.note: Full path on SY094 to .ipa file

preconditions: macincloud-login macro has been run; Transporter.app holds Tate's Apple ID
ssh2 npm package available on agent host (installed 29 Apr 2026)

macros.name: macincloud-login
macros.description: One-time supervised macro to seed Tate Apple ID into Xcode > Settings > Accounts on SY094 (MacInCloud Mac). Drives Xcode dialog up to password field, then PAUSES for operator to type password + 2FA. Path: SSH + AppleScript via ssh2 npm. After 2FA clears once, Xcode keychain holds session ~30 days, unblocking xcode-organizer-upload + transporter-upload.

stage_only.note: If true, only stage AppleScript on SY094 without invoking osascript. Used for SSH-path verification when supervised operator is not at VNC.

preconditions: ssh2 npm package available on agent host (installed 29 Apr 2026)
SY094.macincloud.com reachable on port 22 (verify with sshHelper.runRemote `echo ok`)
Supervised operator (Tate) at SY094 VNC console to type Apple ID password + 2FA when AppleScript pauses
macros.pause_point: After typing apple_email + clicking Continue. Xcode focuses the password field. AppleScript exits with stdout 'OK PAUSED_AT_PASSWORD email=<email>'. Macro itself does NOT type passwords; supervised operator does.

macros.name: github-login
macros.description: GitHub login via Chrome autofill. Verifies logged-in state on github.com, drives /login flow if logged out. Polling waits, 2FA-aware.

macros.name: stripe-dashboard
macros.description: Verify / log in to Stripe dashboard at https://dashboard.stripe.com via Chrome autofill. Polling waits, 2FA-aware.

macros.name: gmail-send
macros.description: Compose and send an email via Tate Corazon Chrome at gmail.google.com (Workspace tate@ecodia.au profile). Supports to/cc/bcc/subject/body. send=false leaves a draft instead.

macros.name: supabase-dashboard
macros.description: Verify / log in to Supabase dashboard (https://supabase.com/dashboard). Default path is GitHub OAuth (Tate GitHub session in Chrome). Set use_github=false for email/password autofill.

macros.name: vercel-redeploy
macros.description: Trigger Redeploy on the most recent Vercel deployment. Drives the project deployments page in Tate Corazon Chrome (logged-in Vercel session). Useful when an env-var change needs a fresh build with the same source.

org.note: Vercel org/team slug (e.g. 'ecodiatate'). Combined with project to build URL.

project.note: Vercel project slug (e.g. 'ecodiaos-frontend'). Combined with org.

macros.name: asc-build-review-submit

build_id.note: Informational; chain-runner navigates to the build page before invocation

dry_run.note: If true, halt before step 5 (Save click)

macros.description: Submit a TestFlight build for App Review on App Store Connect via Tate's logged-in Chrome on Corazon
preconditions: Foreground window is Chrome with title containing 'App Store Connect' (handler asserts this; throws WrongForegroundWindowError otherwise)
Chain-runner has populated URL bar / clipboard with appstoreconnect destination before invocation
